heading: Construction for dam safety
label: 507 Construction for dam safety
text: Except as provided in , construction authorized by this subchapter shall be for the purposes of dam safety and not for the specific purposes of providing additional conservation storage capacity or of developing benefits over and above those provided by the original dams and reservoirs. Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to reduce the amount of project costs allocated to reimbursable purposes heretofore authorized.section 509b of this title
notes: Amendments2015— substituted “Except as provided in , construction” for “Construction”.Pub. L. 114–113section 509b of this title
amendments: Amendments2015— substituted “Except as provided in , construction” for “Construction”.Pub. L. 114–113section 509b of this title
